2605.13769.title: Dense vs Sparse Pretraining at Tiny Scale: Active-Parameter vs Total-Parameter Matching
2605.13769.paper_summary: We study dense and mixture-of-experts (MoE) transformers in a tiny-scale pretraining regime under a shared LLaMA-style decoder training recipe. The sparse model replaces dense feed-forward blocks with Mixtral-style routed experts. Dense baselines are modestly width-resized to tightly match either active or total parameter budgets, while tokenizer, data, optimizer, schedule, depth, context length, normalization style, and evaluation protocol are held fixed. Our best sparse recipe uses four experts, top-2 routing, Switch-style load balancing, and router z-loss. In a three-seed full-data comparison, the dense active-match model reaches 1.6545 +/- 0.0012 best validation loss, the MoE reaches 1.5788 +/- 0.0020, and the dense total-match model reaches 1.5608 +/- 0.0025. This yields a matched-active gap of 0.0758 +/- 0.0021 in the MoE's favor and a matched-total gap of 0.0180 +/- 0.0020 in the dense model's favor. Across training, the matched-active advantage grows while the matched-total dense advantage narrows sharply. In this sub-25M-parameter regime, MoE therefore improves validation loss under active-parameter matching but does not surpass dense training at equal total stored capacity.
2605.13769.paper_summary_zh: 我們在共享的 LLaMA 風格解碼器訓練食譜下，研究密集型和混合專家 (MoE) Transformer在微型預訓練方案中的表現。稀疏模型用 Mixtral 風格的路由專家替代了密集型前饋區塊。密集基準模型的寬度適度調整，以緊密匹配活躍或總參數預算，而分詞器、數據、優化器、計劃、深度、上下文長度、正規化風格和評估協議則保持不變。我們最佳的稀疏食譜使用四個專家、前二路由、Switch 風格的負載平衡和路由器 z-loss。在三次種子全數據比較中，密集型活躍匹配模型達到 1.6545 +/- 0.0012 的最佳驗證損失，MoE 達到 1.5788 +/- 0.0020，密集型總匹配模型達到 1.5608 +/- 0.0025。這產生了 MoE 有利的匹配活躍差距 0.0758 +/- 0.0021，以及密集模型有利的匹配總差距 0.0180 +/- 0.0020。在訓練過程中，匹配活躍的優勢增長，而匹配總的密集優勢則急劇縮小。在這個小於 25M 參數的範疇中，MoE 因此在活躍參數匹配下改善了驗證損失，但在相等的總存儲容量下並未超越密集訓練。
2605.13769.author: Abdalrahman Wael et.al.
